Off Calendar Dec-05-2017 Dismissal

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-29-2017 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-05-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar Sep-01-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Apearances:
Joshua C. Ezrin (415-553-6055) for Plaintiff/ opposing party Jose Adriazola.
Andrew Klimenko (415-984-8563) for Defendant/Moving party ALBERTO OCON.
Jesse M. Sullivan (415-546-7500) for Defendant/Moving party ROGER OCON.

The matter is heard concurrently with case # CGC-16-550547. The Court announces the tentative ruling. Hearing is held. Argued re: constructive eviction. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ROGER OCON'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is DENIED. Moving party failed to comply with CRC 3.1350(b). No issues to be adjudicated are listed in the Separate Statement. There are also triable issues of fact. See Defendant's response to Plaintiff's Additional facts. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)
